# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Security updates are provided for the latest version of the Anarchitects plugins.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

Instead, use GitHub private vulnerability reporting if enabled for this repository.

If not available, contact the maintainers directly.

Include:

- affected package
- affected version
- reproduction steps
- potential impact
- suggested remediation (if known)

## Disclosure

We aim to acknowledge reports quickly and coordinate fixes before public disclosure.
